select
distinct
from dbo.ops_delivery_plan_detail
order by ${orderByClause}

update dbo.ops_delivery_plan_detail
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_no = #{record.poNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_no_item = #{record.poNoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
po_no_split_no = #{record.poNoSplitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
do_source = #{record.doSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

db_id = #{record.dbId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
inventory_status = #{record.inventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delivery = #{record.delivery,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
receive = #{record.receive,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
event_source = #{record.eventSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort = #{record.sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
current_cycle = #{record.currentCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cycle_name = #{record.cycleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

begin_date = #{record.beginDate,jdbcType=DATE},
end_date = #{record.endDate,jdbcType=DATE},

work_day = #{record.workDay,jdbcType=INTEGER},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=BIGINT},

creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ex_relation = #{record.exRelation,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.ops_delivery_plan_detail
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_no = #{poNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},

end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE},

creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ex_relation = #{exRelation,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
